# 新闻速递 2026-03-22

## AppLovin
- AppLovin业绩表现强劲但股价意外下滑，引发市场对其估值与前景的困惑。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwwFBVV95cUxOSFJodFRrRmdQSm5mODJVdkx2UzNrcjN5dnNFSS1PQ0kxSVh2Yl94T0Jxek94ZW4yRkFkUGxzX0kwckpVRm00SGZ6RWphZ1lGMHZUUzFTUGVHb0luUXVOLTMta05aZi0xbnNGQVlPRlNVUFdORVBXYnNjRGJGaFc1QnJ4a2M1UDVGaVFzdFRnS0lsOHIxNEdJS3dudTFtRi1ndnNlWk1XTDVhbGVMY1N5dXBHU29YbnF0dzVpRDVzXzhua2c?oc=5)）
- AppLovin近期股价剧烈波动，或促使投资者重新评估其内在价值及市场定位。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxQa2lzaklCcDloaF__zWjV5dnkzRzF0MVBNTTdOQWdkeQ?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- MercadoLibre股价创年度新低，尽管业务表现强劲，或预示市场对其长期增长判断存在分歧。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxOQTVuXzRCX0cxUy1YN3VqTWt3VkJ3V0VSYXZPWkdjd0xEN1pXNWY5MDJ2X3hLVEhQOFpwNm8zdXdWSmhnRUJrVmItM25wMFRieHEzd2NLQXJ0U04wb29IQVFYeXczcjhGRG8zQ1ctd1hhYkdiNGltWTFJaWE0YmJxVllqTWZXSVRBXzRhZDkxQjltaVhFZFc4cXpRZ00yZWpmV0k3X1cwM1dYYVVxdnlGOS13Qzl5MVl0cy1iUzR0aVlzRnVZ?oc=5)）
